subtitle: AI Content Empire — 3 Channels · One Factory
tagline: Three Channels. One Empire. Original mythology for kids. Epic history for adults. Original robot heroes for the next generation.

CH01.name: Little Olympus
CH01.tagline: Big Gods. Little Heroes. Epic Adventures.
CH01.concept: Greek & Roman mythology retold as a kids animated universe. Think CoComelon meets Clash of the Titans. The gap nobody else is filling.
CH01.strategic_gap: Zero kids mythology channels at this quality level
CH01.market_proof: CoComelon switched to 3D 2017 → 2B monthly views 2018 → $3B sale

characters.name: Little Zeus
characters.role: Energetic leader. Lightning bolt obsessed. Brave but reckless.

characters.name: Baby Hercules
characters.role: Doesn't know his own strength. Comic relief. Heart of gold.

characters.name: Athena
characters.role: The strategist. Always has a plan. Educational voice of the group.

characters.name: Little Perseus
characters.role: The brave kid hero. Audience surrogate. Never gives up.

characters.name: Young Achilles
characters.role: Fastest warrior kid. Fearless. Has a soft spot for his heel.

characters.name: Mini Medusa
characters.role: Misunderstood villain. Recurring character. Kids love her.

characters.name: Uncle Hades
characters.role: Spooky but funny. The underworld uncle. Secretly helpful.

episode_pipeline.title: Baby Hercules and the Giant Snake
Zeus vs. the Titans — The Final Battle

CH02.name: Gods & Glory
CH02.tagline: Cinematic AI documentaries on Greek mythology, Roman Empire, Spartan warriors, Norse gods.
CH02.concept: The History Channel meets 300 meets YouTube. Premium cinematic documentary. High RPM, sponsorship goldmine.
CH02.note: Previously named Empire Decoded — same concept, elevated brand

content_pillars.name: Greek Mythology
content_pillars.desc: Zeus, Hercules, Perseus, Medusa, Titans, Olympus. The original cinematic universe.

content_pillars.name: Roman Empire
content_pillars.desc: Caesar, Augustus, gladiators, legions. Rise and fall. Cinematic gold.

content_pillars.name: Spartan Warriors
content_pillars.desc: 300 energy. Thermopylae. Spartan culture. Proven viral category.

content_pillars.name: Norse Mythology
content_pillars.desc: Thor, Odin, Ragnarok, Vikings. Massive Marvel crossover audience.

content_pillars.name: Lost Civilizations
content_pillars.desc: Troy, Atlantis, Carthage. Mystery angle drives massive click rates.

content_pillars.name: Epic Battles
content_pillars.desc: Thermopylae, Cannae, Marathon, Actium. Higgsfield renders them all.

CH03.name: Mech Legends
CH03.tagline: Original robot heroes. 90s Transformers energy for the next generation.
CH03.concept: 100% owned IP — no licensing risk, full merchandise rights, acquisition potential. Transforming vehicles, epic battles, toyetic characters.
CH03.note: Previously named Iron Legends — characters updated to toyetic vehicle-transformers
CH03.market_proof: Hasbro launched Transformers: Cyberworld July 2025. Hasbro Legends nostalgia service projecting 70M homes. He-Man movie 2026.

heroes.name: GRANITE
heroes.role: Massive strength. Gentle giant. Funny one.

heroes.name: NOVA
heroes.role: The scientist. Builds gadgets. Solves problems.

villains.name: RUMBLE
villains.role: Wants to rule everything. DRAMATIC. OVERWHELMING.

villains.name: BOLT
villains.role: Rumble's sneaky sidekick. Small, fast, always causing trouble.

ip_roadmap.action: Launch channel, build audience, establish characters
Design toy prototypes — characters built toyetically
Approach toy manufacturers / Amazon seller launch
License to streaming platforms (Amazon Kids+, Kidoodle)
IP acquisition by Hasbro, Moonbug, or private equity

agents.name: Scout Agent
agents.role: Trend research — scans YouTube, TikTok, social every Monday

agents.name: Script Agent
agents.role: Episode scripts, hooks, SEO copy for all 3 channels

agents.name: Director Agent
agents.role: Shot-by-shot visual briefs formatted for Higgsfield
